name: agent-teams
description: Delegate tasks to coordinated Codex exec teammates with shared task, inbox, outbox, logs, and final synthesis files.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate a task to coordinated Codex teammates
interface.longDescription: Agent Teams is a delegation wrapper: it launches a configurable Codex project team, routes the user's task to teammates, coordinates shared task and inbox/outbox files, captures logs, runs peer review, and generates a lead synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this task to Agent Teams and report the coordinated team's result.
